tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
From every corner of the earth we rise

Ninety thousand voices wide awake

We are the world united
Every flag every face ignited
From the streets to the pitch we came
Beautiful game beautiful game

Heart and soul we won't be divided
Sing it loud let them hear our name

Streets of São Paulo to the fields of France
Tokyo to Lagos this is our dance
Every language singing the same refrain

[Pre-Chorus]
Can you feel the thunder roll
Every nation body and soul

[Chorus]
We are the world united
Every flag every face ignited
From the streets to the pitch we came
Beautiful game beautiful game

[Bridge]
Olé olé olé olé
From June to July we play
History written on the grass today

[Outro]
Beautiful game beautiful game
We'll never be the same
